title: The Enemy’s Trick Is Exposed
description: On pages 17–18, this part focuses on the enemy’s trick is exposed, keeping the scene centered on the conflict, choices, and stakes of the Alabasta arc.
scene: The Enemy’s Trick Is Exposed. Sanji’s fight with Bon Clay reaches its decisive point as loyalty, deception, and raw strength collide. This section presents the immediate scene beat before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: It'll take longer for him to recover after an attack... If I can dodge the first attack, speed is on my side...

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: I think you've got something on your cheek.
